description.en: List recent iMessage conversations with the latest message from each.
description.de: Aktuelle iMessage-Unterhaltungen mit der letzten Nachricht auflisten.

prompt.macos: /sqlite3 ~/Library/Messages/chat.db "SELECT c.chat_identifier, c.display_name, datetime(m.date/1000000000 + 978307200, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') as last_message_date, CASE WHEN m.is_from_me = 1 THEN 'me' ELSE coalesce(h.id, 'unknown') END as sender, substr(m.text, 1, 100) as preview FROM chat c JOIN chat_message_join cmj ON c.rowid = cmj.chat_id JOIN message m ON cmj.message_id = m.rowid LEFT JOIN handle h ON m.handle_id = h.rowid WHERE m.text IS NOT NULL AND m.rowid = (SELECT MAX(m2.rowid) FROM message m2 JOIN chat_message_join cmj2 ON m2.rowid = cmj2.message_id WHERE cmj2.chat_id = c.rowid AND m2.text IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY m.date DESC LIMIT {{LIMIT}};"

inputs.name: Limit
inputs.bot: How many recent conversations to list. Default to 15 if the user doesn't specify.
